title: Badge: Young Earner
resultGreatDescription: You made {{score}} smart earning decisions out of {{total}} challenges!
skillsDescription: You learned to earn money through chores, selling items, teaching skills, and honest work!
wisdomDescription: These habits will help you build a strong foundation for financial success!
resultKeepDescription: You made {{score}} smart earning decisions out of {{total}} challenges.
resultKeepTip: Remember, earning money through honest work, chores, and using your skills is the best way to build financial success!

challenges.title: Chores
challenges.question: What's a good way to earn pocket money at home?

feedback.correct: Excellent! Doing chores teaches responsibility and earns money fairly!
feedback.wrong: Earning money through work like chores is the right way - not demanding or taking!

challenges.title: Selling
challenges.question: You have toys you don't use. What's smart?

feedback.correct: Perfect! Selling unused items is a smart way to earn money and declutter!
feedback.wrong: Selling unused toys is better than throwing them away or hoarding them!

challenges.title: Teaching
challenges.question: You're good at drawing. How can you earn?

feedback.correct: Amazing! Using your skills to teach others is a great way to earn money!
feedback.wrong: Sharing your skills by teaching others is a smart way to earn money!

challenges.title: Crafts
challenges.question: School fair is coming. What's a good earning idea?

feedback.correct: Great! Making and selling crafts at school fairs is a fun way to earn money!
feedback.wrong: Creating and selling your own crafts is a creative way to earn money!

challenges.title: Studying
challenges.question: Parents offer money for good grades. What do you do?

feedback.correct: Wonderful! Earning money through honest hard work and good grades is the right way!
feedback.wrong: Always earn money honestly through hard work, not by cheating or making excuses!
